👑Sovereign of Doom👑.description: The leader of the hive. Oversees all hive operations and makes the final decisions.

🛡️Herald of Chaos🛡️.description: The second-in-command of the hive. Supports the Sovereign of Doom and helps oversee the hive's operations.
promotion_requirements: Earn the trust of the Sovereign of Doom
responsibilities: Oversee the hive when the Sovereign of Doom is unavailable
Manage and improve the hive's Discord
Develop systems to improve the member experience

⚖️Harbinger of Order⚖️.description: A senior leader responsible for supporting the hive and ensuring operations continue smoothly.
promotion_requirements: Earn the trust of the leadership team
responsibilities: Stay up to date with game information and updates
Help oversee the hive when needed

🩸Minister of Pain🩸.description: A senior member responsible for supervising lower-ranking members and helping maintain an active and organized hive.

🐦‍🔥War Hawk🐦‍🔥.description: An experienced member dedicated to growing the hive and keeping the community active and engaged.

😡Acolyte of Rage😡.description: The entry rank for all new recruits. Acolytes are expected to learn the hive's rules, remain active, and demonstrate their commitment before advancing.
promotion_requirements: Do not be inactive for more than 3 days without notice
